resources.string: Tap the tome or begin the rite to move through the four sacred states.
Each awakening should feel ceremonial: warm, dangerous, and beautiful. We can keep the magic high without overwhelming weaker phones.
An ancient leather relic, sealed and breathing softly in the dark. Its story has not yet chosen a voice.
Gold heat leaks through the binding. The tome is waking, answering touch with ritual flame and emberlight.
The book has become sentient. Cyan runes and star-fire gather at the edges as the library listens back.
The pages break open in a burst of light. Story, voice, and image spill free as the tome enters full manifestation.
